rationale: The proposed change concerns the Tax Code residence homestead exemption amount. The cited rule governs mail ballot carrier envelope formatting under the Election Code. The two provisions address unrelated subjects and do not intersect.
quote: "Carrier Envelope for Early Voting Ballot," the name and official title of the early voting clerk as addressee, and the clerk's official mailing address must be printed on the face of each official carrier envelope for a ballot to be voted by mail.
_note: No overlap between proposed Tax Code §11.13(b) change and Elec. Code §86.013 carrier envelope requirements.
